form.formComment: Resuming after a five month break. Finished off last preparation second of 8 at Eagle Farm Mdn November 12 over 1600m, a neck behind In Society with 58.5kg at $2.70. On debut third of 11 at this track Cg&E Mdn-Sw October 8 over 1350m, 2.5 len behind Provoker with 55.5kg at $2.90. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 3rd of 13 at Sunshine Coast Mdn on March 29 over 1000m, slow going 1.5 len behind Naturally Lit carrying 59kg at $26. Previously second-up 3rd of 8 at Gatton Mdn-Sw on December 21 over 860m, 1.75 len behind Betty Maud carrying 58.5kg at $4.20. Maybe a place.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: First starter by Cool Aza Beel out of Giroux. Half-brother to six-time winner Call To Glory. Dam was a winner of one race. Only trial was March 17 at Doomben when third over 840m. Capable of a solid performance on debut.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by Cool Aza Beel out of Giroux. Half-brother to six-time winner Call To Glory. Dam was a winner of one race. Only trial was March 17 at Doomben when third over 840m. Capable of a solid performance on debut.

form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of eight months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign second of 7 at Eagle Farm Mdn-Sw August 13 over 1400m, soft track; a long neck behind Le Chocolat with 56.5kg at $8. Previously first up; second of 8 at this track Mdn-Sw June 11 over 1200m, 0.5 len behind Gagnante Enchere with 56kg at $10. A bright start to the prep is anticipated.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in under pressure in the home straight.

Laid in under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation fourth of 8 at Gosford Mdn-Sw November 11 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Just Response carrying 57.5kg at $3.90. form.formComment: Half-brother to Group 3 winner Tornado Valley. Second-up. First-up after five months 4th of 11 at Ipswich Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Raging carrying 58.5kg at $3.10. Previously second-up 5th of 8 at Hawkesbury Mdn on October 9 over 1300m, 4 len behind Hetzendorf carrying 55kg at $16. Not the worst.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Made the 800m bend awkwardly and got its head up.
Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after 10 months 7th of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 18 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Saint Aldwyn with 57.5kg at $16. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at Ipswich 2yo Hcp on May 5 over 1350m, 2.25 len behind Call Da Vinci carrying 57.5kg at $7. Fitter but others are better placed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, shifted out and bumped Tappy's Star. Over-raced early.

form.formComment: Most recently eased back early on 3rd in a small field at Eagle Farm Mdn-Sw on March 25 over 1000m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Rewrite carrying 56.5kg at $4.60. Before that 2nd of 9 at this track Mdn on March 11 over 1110m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind Sky Dweller carrying 54kg at $8. Well placed. This looks an ideal assignment.

form.formComment: First starter by Nicconi out of Miss De Vega. Half-sister to five-time winner Lucky Encounter. Dam was a one-start maiden. Has a total of four trials prior to her debut today. Doesn't shape as a strong winning hope today.

The start before that 9th of 11 at Ipswich Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1200m, 6 len behind Raging carrying 58.5kg at $51. Plenty of these look to have him covered.

form.formComment: At the latest run sat on the pace when 2nd of 11 at Ipswich Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Raging with 58.5kg at $2.90. The race before that tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 3rd of 11 at Ipswich Mdn on February 20 over 1200m, 1.0 len behind Lavarack carrying 55kg at $4.20. Drops in the weights and another bold showing is expected.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping. Shifted out and away from heels soon after the start.

form.formComment: At the latest run came from midfield; 3rd of 12 at Sunshine Coast 3yo Mdn on April 5 over 1200m, in the wet; 3.5 len behind War Is Brutal with 58kg at $12. The start before that crossed from a wide gate to lead but couldn't hold on when 6th of 11 at Ipswich Mdn-Sw on March 26 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Raging with 55.5kg at $8.50. Will need further improvement to trouble these.
